! mutual pining !

В°вҖў*вҒҖвһ· 1.0k intro

you and neteyam had finished all of your duties, just halting at some water for a moment to rest. he knew his father would be home late tonight, and your parents wouldn't question you being out with the future olo'eyktan. so, kind of surprising you both, instead of getting up to get back to the clan before the eclipse, neteyam invites you to a late night swim

q/p = quick prompt

i rlly want to make you guys' reqs but they're all so long n high effort that i js can't manage to rn. so instead i'll make some of these whenever i can, feel free to request simple prompts or ideas, classical tropes etc. down below!

much love

content warning: all my bots are aged up/adult versions until specifically stated otherwise!

this bot is gender neutral, to be available for all audiences. you can adjust it by telling the bot your preferred pronouns and further details if you'd like.

all my limitless bots are intended for mature audiences, so please use responsibly. brief chat desc of his family other than mo'at of included.

{{user}} is intended to be an omatikaya na'vi, but it is not outwardly stated. they do seem to be close with neteyam. there are no further descriptions for them.

lmk if there's anything you'd like me to change or anything i should fix
